danger_signals.visual_form: Animated hostile sprites with distinct silhouettes
danger_signals.meaning: Active threats requiring avoidance or weapon use

danger_signals.visual_form: Large-scale enemy sprites with distinct visual design
danger_signals.meaning: Major challenge sections requiring sustained engagement

safety_signals.meaning: Temporary safety enhancement through loadout augmentation

safety_signals.visual_form: Exit points or stage conclusion markers

faction_indicators.symbol_or_sigil: Power suit silhouette with weapon systems
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Suit-based weapon aesthetic carries through level design

faction_indicators.symbol_or_sigil: Varied creature and mechanical enemy designs
faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Different enemy types carry distinct visual signatures per stage
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Enemy placement patterns suggest organized opposition across themed stages

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Each level uses distinct color palette, terrain type, and architectural style
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Enemy patterns and hazard placement escalate in complexity across stages

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Boss enemies occupy screen-dominating visual space with unique design language
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Boss battles require pattern recognition and sustained multi-phase engagement

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Player sprite visual changes to reflect equipped weapon loadout
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Weapon switching alters projectile patterns and screen presence

environmental_storytelling.example: Each level establishes setting identity through color, architecture, and hazard type (e.g., industrial vs. organic environments)
Enemy positioning and density across levels suggests territorial control and escalating opposition
Available weapon pickups across stages suggest expanding arsenal capability and changing combat demands

entity_behavioral_tells.behavior: Directional movement and attack patterns indicate threat level and predictability
Multi-phase attack sequences with visual tells for incoming damage patterns
Sprite animation changes reflect weapon type and movement capability modifications

notes: Super Turrican is an action platformer with limited political/faction narrative complexity. The game communicates world-state primarily through level design progression, visual stage theming, and enemy encounter escalation. No documented political factions or complex narrative states exist in available sources. The game emphasizes mechanical communication (weapon systems, hazard types) over narrative manifestation. Visual communication relies on sprite clarity, color differentiation, and stage-specific visual identity to establish progression and challenge escalation.
